hypothesis: In the optimized mixed electrolyte (1.5 M KHCO3/0.75 M K2CO3, total K+ 3 M), applying a 2 Hz square-wave current alternating between 200 and 300 mA cm−2 with 50% duty at 54 °C and flows of 144 mL min−1 KHCO3 and 24 mL min−1 KOH will increase reactor yield by at least 20% compared to constant 249 mA cm−2 operation under otherwise identical conditions.
